name: inventoryOptimize
invariants: output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.items.every(function(i){ return Number.isFinite(i.eoq) && Number.isFinite(i.reorderPoint) && Number.isFinite(i.safetyStock) && Number.isFinite(i.currentStock) && Number.isFinite(i.daysOfStock); })
output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.items.every(function(i){ return typeof i.needsReorder === 'boolean'; })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler (dispatch key 'supplychain.inventoryOptimize'); reads artifact.data.items. EOQ = round(sqrt(2*dailyDemand*365*orderCost/holdingCost)) with parseFloat||defaults (50/5); safetyStock = ceil(demand*leadTime*0.5); reorderPoint = ceil(demand*leadTime + safetyStock). POISON: parseFloat/parseInt collapse garbage to defaults so every numeric stays FINITE (fail-CLOSED). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTIONS, not in MACROS); authored spec pinned by server/tests/supplychain-lens-macros.test.js. Component: SupplyChainActionPanel.actInv renders items[].item/currentStock/reorderPoint/eoq/daysOfStock/needsReorder + needsReorder/totalItems.
